title: asplenium rutaceum
intro: Asplenium rutaceum, also known as the Rue-leaved Asplenium or Asplenium with Rue-like Leaves, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Asplenium rutaceum include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to act as a diuretic and lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, Asplenium rutaceum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
